title: Infosys Board Approves Promoter Group Reclassification Request
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that its Board approved a request from Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal to reclassify their names from the 'Promoter and promoter group' category to 'Public' under Regulation 31A of SEBI LODR. The document does not disclose any shareholding percentages, financial impact, or change in management control.

key_facts.fact: Infosys’s Board approved a request from Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal seeking reclassification from the category of 'Promoter and promoter group' to 'Public'.
The reclassification request was made in terms of Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
The document does not disclose any shareholding percentage, financial impact, or change in control associated with the reclassification request.

corporate_actions.description: Board-approved request to reclassify Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from 'Promoter and promoter group' to 'Public'.
